ab: upitu pakiaturua musa ku ariatʉkʉrana arinani.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: umiapʉ cu, puaruma tarʉana umiapʉ pakiaturuana, amihla kapitanʉ tarʉana, “musiri! matitʉnʉlʉ!”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: marumaru maci umiiapʉ, tumututuru pakiaturua ihlahlamu kari tahlana umarucacani.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Hla′alua language of numbers.

ab: pialʉvʉ mu pakiaturua, pahlusahli cu a mu sahli umarucacani.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.
I have learned many Hla′alua languages.

ab: ariari ku umaiiapʉ, ariari ku musuturu kari tahlana, tumua ku umahlikua ina’a tumimahla.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Hla′alua language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
